productDisplayName: UCB Men's Polo Neck Striper White Yellow T-shirt
description: CompositionGreen, white and black striped polo neck jersey t-shirt, made of 100% cotton, with a front buttoned rugged placket, ribbed collar with a velvetty in-seam, short sleeves with ribbed hems, embroidered Big Ben logo on left chest in white and black, white stitch detailing below placket and slits on shirt side endsFittingComfortWash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees Use mild detergent Do not tumble dry Do not wring Do not bleach Do not dry clean Do not dry in direct sunlight Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Youthful and stylish, this striped polo neck t-shirt from the united colors of benetton is perfect for those happy days. The embroidered Big Ben logo coupled with the rugged placket adds to that high-street fashion, while the slits at the shirt ends offer a comfortable Fit. Team this with jeans and lifestyle sportswear for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
